name: io.github.thejaredchapman/docs-rag
title: Docs RAG
description: Answer questions about a local folder of markdown/PDF docs with source citations, via FAISS retrieval over any LLM provider (through litellm).

environmentVariables.name: CHAT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Chat model name, resolved by litellm (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-6, ollama/llama3.1). Defaults to gpt-4o.

environmentVariables.name: EMBED_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model name, resolved by litellm. Must match the model used at ingest time. Defaults to text-embedding-3-small.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required if CHAT_MODEL or EMBED_MODEL is an OpenAI model.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required if CHAT_MODEL is an Anthropic model.

environmentVariables.name: DOCS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the folder of markdown/PDF docs to index. Defaults to ./docs relative to the current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: INDEX_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to store/read the FAISS index. Defaults to ./index relative to the current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: LITELLM_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional: route all calls through a running LiteLLM proxy instead of calling providers directly.

environmentVariables.name: LITELLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: API key for the LiteLLM proxy, if LITELLM_API_BASE is set.

environmentVariables.name: CHAT_PARAMS
environmentVariables.description: Optional: arbitrary JSON object merged into every chat call (e.g. {"temperature": 0.2}). A "model" key overrides CHAT_MODEL. Use this for providers needing more than a model name, like Azure or Bedrock.

environmentVariables.name: EMBED_PARAMS
environmentVariables.description: Optional: arbitrary JSON object merged into every embedding call. A "model" key overrides EMBED_MODEL.
